case_title: CHARLES LINDLEY VS. MACYS WEST et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-18-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-18-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 610

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-18-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST CHARLES LINDLEY, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-18-2011 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-02-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-04-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER CHARLES LINDLEY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar May-04-2011 Denied

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2011 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-18-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2011 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings not reported. (610)
